name: User Story

---

### 📝 Description
**As a** [type of user]
**I want to** [action/functionality]
**so that** [goal/benefit]

### ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The system should...
- [ ] Validate that...

### 🧪 Test Cases
- [ ] **TC-01:** [Case name- Happy Path]
- [ ] **TC-02:** [Case name - Negative Path]
- [ ] **TC-03:** [Case name - Edge Case]

### 🤖 Estado de Automatización
- [ ] Automated with Playwright (#PR-ID)
